name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Fwd: #RubioCrimeSpree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter--
Did you see Terry's email from last week about the New
York Times story attacking Marco for his 4 traffic tickets over
the last 20 years?
It's true: We've entered the "silly season" of this
election cycle when the media is focusing on driving tickets
instead of the real issues.
Marco is going to win this election by staying focused on
what really matters. That's why we're talking directly with
voters everywhere we go, and that's why we need your help:
Click here to donate now and help deliver Marco's
positive message where it matters most.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42411323:17457079411:m:3:1349778030:0FF4102E94CE646C2420B53747143A31:r
Thanks for your help.
Alex Conant

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
Date: Fri, Jun 5, 2015 at 7:25 PM
Subject: #RubioCrimeSpree
To: Alex Conant

Alex,
The Hillary Clinton machine and the New York
Times have teamed up to run a story on a huge scandal...
Marco has had 4 traffic tickets in the last
20 years!!!
The Times really went into overdrive
searching for these kind of "scandals" in Marco's rearview
mirror.
We know it's one scandal Hillary Clinton
doesn't have to worry about since it's been nearly that long
since she's driven a car herself.
But this campaign is about the future and
we're looking down the road. Marco's campaign is about something
bigger: a vision for our future.
If the press is going to park its attention
on silly stories like this one, we have to pass them and talk
directly to voters.
Click here to donate now to help Marco get
his message straight to voters.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42411323:17457079411:m:3:1349778030:0FF4102E94CE646C2420B53747143A31:r

Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJ4pZYppfN

http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJ4pZYppfN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Why I support marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The Supreme Court will be deciding on federal marriage equality later this month. Friend -- **I support marriage equality because:**
1. I believe in equal rights for all Americans, regardless of race, creed, gender, religion, or sexual orientation.
2. Love is love, regardless of gender.
3. All families deserve to have equal representation under the law.

Those are just three reasons why I support marriage equality. **_[What are your reasons?](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27bd/738133e4/394df6ec/7f9a1c05/4030182496/VEsH/ "http://ready-for-marriage-equality.com/#Murphy")_** The Supreme Court is currently deliberating on four cases that could decide the fate of marriage equality across the country. Their decision is expected this month. With that in mind, I want to make sure your voice is heard on this issue. **[Join me in giving your reasons for supporting marriage equality today, before the Supreme Court's big decision.](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27bd/738133e4/394df6ec/7f9a1c05/4030182496/VEsE/ "http://ready-for-marriage-equality.com/#Murphy")** We'll be sharing some of your responses online. Be sure to fill out the form and include your Twitter handle, if you have one. Thanks for joining the conversation, Patrick Murphy
| **[TAKE THE SURVEY »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27bd/738133e4/394df6ec/7f9a1c05/4030182496/VEsF/ "http://ready-for-marriage-equality.com/#Murphy")**
---

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27bd/738133e4/394df6ec/7f9a1c06/4030182496/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
